(a) A revenue bond indenture may limit the exercise of a power granted by Section 173.004 (Nature of District) , 173.005, 173.111 (Retirement Benefits) , 173.151 (General Powers of District) , 173.152 (Rules) , 173.153 (Agreements Generally) , 173.154 (Agreements with Other Entities for Joint Use) , 173.155 (Joint Ownership Agreements) , 173.157 (Interlocal Agreements with Commission) , 173.159 (Eminent Domain) , 173.160 (Suits) , 173.201 (General Authority over Commuter Rail Facilities) , 173.202 (Powers Relating to District Property) , 173.203 (Use and Alteration of Property of Another Political Subdivision) , 173.204 (Rules Governing System and Routings) , 173.205 (Acquisition of Property) , 173.206 (Acquisition of Rolling Stock and Other Property) , 173.207 (Compensation for Use of System Facilities) , 173.208 (Operation or Use Contracts) , 173.209 (Rail Transportation Services Agreements with Other Political Subdivisions) , 173.251 (Fiscal Year) , 173.252 (Annual Budget) , 173.253 (Grants and Loans) , 173.254 (Depository) , or 173.255 (Purchase of Additional Insured Provisions) .

(b) The limitation applies while any of the revenue bonds issued under the indenture are outstanding and unpaid.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.304 — Limit on Power

(a) A revenue bond indenture may limit the exercise of a power granted by Section 173.004 (Nature of District) , 173.005, 173.111 (Retirement Benefits) , 173.151 (General Powers of District) , 173.152 (Rules) , 173.153 (Agreements Generally) , 173.154 (Agreements with Other Entities for Joint Use) , 173.155 (Joint Ownership Agreements) , 173.157 (Interlocal Agreements with Commission) , 173.159 (Eminent Domain) , 173.160 (Suits) , 173.201 (General Authority over Commuter Rail Facilities) , 173.202 (Powers Relating to District Property) , 173.203 (Use and Alteration of Property of Another Political Subdivision) , 173.204 (Rules Governing System and Routings) , 173.205 (Acquisition of Property) , 173.206 (Acquisition of Rolling Stock and Other Property) , 173.207 (Compensation for Use of System Facilities) , 173.208 (Operation or Use Contracts) , 173.209 (Rail Transportation Services Agreements with Other Political Subdivisions) , 173.251 (Fiscal Year) , 173.252 (Annual Budget) , 173.253 (Grants and Loans) , 173.254 (Depository) , or 173.255 (Purchase of Additional Insured Provisions) .

(b) The limitation applies while any of the revenue bonds issued under the indenture are outstanding and unpaid.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The limitation applies while any of the revenue bonds issued under the indenture are outstanding and unpaid.
